title: AS 1720.1:2010 Timber Member Design
description: Design structural timber members in accordance with AS 1720.1:2010.

member_label.description: Member Label. Label for the timber member.

seasoned.description: Treatment. Unseasoned timber has an average moisture content that exceeds 25%.

hard_soft.description: Species Type. Is the timber species a hardwood or softwood?

section.description: Section. Symbol: Section. Typical section sizes from manufactures taken from SkyCiv Section Library.If required size not available use 'custom' to input width and depth of section manually.

d.description: d. Symbol: d. Units: mm. Section Depth.

b.description: b. Symbol: b. Units: mm. Section Width.

number_holes.description: No. of Bolt Holes. Maximum number of bolt holes that intersect a tension plane along the member (perpendicular area to grain). For example if there was a 3 x 3 grid of bolt holes, the number of bolt holes would be 3.

hole_diameter.description: Hole Diameter. Units: mm. Diameter of bolt holes in the timber member.

duration.description: Load Duration. Used to calculate k1 factor as per 2.4.1.1 AS 1720. For example, wind and Earthquake loads have a 5 second duration. Dead loads have a 50+ year duration.

application.description: Member Application. This dropdown relates to the determination of the capacity factor based on Table 2.1 of AS 1720.

house.description: Building Type. If the building is a house a less conservative reduction factor can be adopted where the member does not impact an area greater than 25 m2. See Table 2.1 AS 1720.

area.description: Area of Failure Impact. If failure is likely to impact an area greater than 25 m2 select '≥ 25 m2'. See Table 2.1 AS 1720.

load_sharing_direction.description: Load Sharing. Direction of load sharing to consider for the k9 factor. The other direction will consider no load sharing (k9 = 1). Alternatively can conservatively select the 'No Load Sharing' option.

ncom.description: ncom. Symbol: n_{com}. Number of elements that are effectively fastened together to form a single group.

nmem.description: nmem. Symbol: n_{mem}. Number of members that are discretely spaced parallel to each other.

s.description: s. Symbol: s. Units: mm. Centre to Centre spacing of discrete parallel members.

restraint_type.description: Restraint Type. Specify restraint arrangement for major axis bending. Refer Clause 3.2.3 for further information.

restraint_side.description: Restraint Face. Specify whether the tension or compression edge is restrained for major axis bending.

L.description: L. Symbol: L. Units: mm. Total Member Segment Length.

Laz.description: Laz. Symbol: L_{az}. Units: mm. Distance between restraints against buckling about the Z-axis.

Lay.description: Lay. Symbol: L_{ay}. Units: mm. Distance between restraints against buckling about the Y-axis.

g13.description: g13. Symbol: g_{13}. Effective length factor g13 as per Table 3.2. Can be conservatively taken as 2.0.

EMC.description: Moisture. Units: %. Equilibrium Moisture Content. Highest value of the annual average moisture content (%) that the timber will attain in service.For reference, seasoned timber (including Glulam & LVL) has a MC  25%.

k6.description: k6. Symbol: k_6. Temperature factor that reduces the strength of seasoned timber at high temperature locations.

Mz.description: M*z. Symbol: M^{*}_{z}. Units: kN-m. Design Bending Moment about Z-axis (major axis).

My.description: M*y. Symbol: M^{*}_{y}. Units: kN-m. Design Bending Moment about Y-axis (minor axis).

Vy.description: V*y. Symbol: V^{*}_{y}. Units: kN. Design shear force in Y-axis direction (major axis).

Vz.description: V*z. Symbol: V^{*}_{z}. Units: kN. Design shear force in Z-axis direction (minor axis).

P.description: N*. Symbol: N^*. Units: kN. Design Axial Force (Compression Positive).

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
